---
title: "Amyloids"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("helpers.R")

dat <- read.csv("data/Amyloids.csv")

unique(dat[c("AGAMYID", "UniProt.ID", "AGAMYID_display_name", "Species.if.not.human")]) |>
  setNames(c("AGAMYID", "UniProt ID", "Name", "Species")) |>
  DT::datatable(escape = FALSE, 
                style = "bootstrap5",
                class = "wrap",
                filter = "top",
                extensions = "Buttons", 
                rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 50,
                               dom = "Bfrtip",
                               buttons = c("copy", "csv"),
                               columnDefs = list(
                                 list(targets = 0, render = render_link("amyloids")),
                    list(targets = 1, render = render_uniprot))
                ))

```
